title: Functional Strength Training
description: Low-to-moderate intensity workout using dumbbells, resistance bands and medicine balls. Focuses on five functional movements — squatting, pulling, pushing, hinging and lifting — to improve everyday mobility and prevent falls.

title: Line Dancing for Seniors
description: Fun group line dancing session with easy-to-follow choreography. A great way to stay active, improve coordination and socialise with fellow seniors.

title: Let's Lim Kopi — Social Gathering
description: Casual social gathering over coffee for senior men. Enjoy good company, easy conversation and light refreshments in a relaxed setting.

title: Digital Literacy Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop helping seniors navigate smartphones, apps and digital services. Learn to use messaging apps, government e-services and more with patient guidance.

title: Free Health Screening
description: Complimentary health screening for seniors including blood pressure monitoring, BMI checks and basic health assessments. Early detection and health awareness for active ageing.

title: Ukulele Jamming Session
description: Weekly 60-minute community music session where seniors learn new songs, practise ukulele skills and exchange tips. Open to all skill levels. $3 per quarter.
venueAddress: Blk 439 Bukit Batok West Ave 8 #02-01, Singapore 650439

title: Circuit Training
description: Low-to-moderate intensity muscle strengthening and endurance training using HUR pneumatic machines from Finland. Participants rotate through stations targeting arms, legs, core and back. Programme developed by NTUC Health physiotherapists.
venueAddress: Blk 439 Bukit Batok West Ave 8 #02-01, Singapore 650439

title: Chair Zumba
description: Heart-pumping cardio dance adapted for seated participants. Fun, energising workout set to lively music that improves cardiovascular health while being gentle on the joints.
venueAddress: Blk 439 Bukit Batok West Ave 8 #02-01, Singapore 650439

title: Healthy Cooking Demonstration
description: Interactive cooking demonstration featuring nutritious, senior-friendly recipes. Learn about balanced meal preparation and healthy eating habits for active ageing.
venueAddress: Blk 439 Bukit Batok West Ave 8 #02-01, Singapore 650439

title: Brain Exercise Workshop
description: Engaging cognitive stimulation activities including word puzzles, memory games and guessing challenges. Keep your mind sharp and have fun with fellow seniors.
venueAddress: Blk 439 Bukit Batok West Ave 8 #02-01, Singapore 650439

title: 365 Lymphatic Detox Exercise
description: Gentle stretches, turning movements and deep-breathing exercises designed to stimulate lymph flow, enhance immune function and support overall well-being.

title: Taichi Qigong
description: Traditional Taichi Qigong session promoting balance, flexibility and inner calm. Suitable for all fitness levels with gentle flowing movements that improve coordination.

title: Arts and Crafts Workshop
description: Creative hands-on workshop featuring seasonal craft projects including terrarium making, paper crafts and decorative art. Express your creativity and take home your creations.

title: Communal Dining & Social Hour
description: Enjoy a shared meal with neighbours and fellow seniors. Communal dining fosters friendships and ensures seniors enjoy nutritious meals in good company.

description: Low-to-moderate intensity workout using dumbbells, resistance bands and medicine balls. Focuses on five functional movements to improve everyday mobility and prevent falls.

title: Karaoke Fun
description: Two-hour weekly karaoke session where seniors sing English oldies, Mandarin ballads, Malay and Hokkien classics. A therapeutic, judgement-free environment to enjoy music and companionship.

title: Circuit Training Focus
description: Slower-paced, highly individualised version of circuit training for frail seniors. Groups capped at 3 participants with unilateral training and range-of-motion limiters. Suitable for post-physio clients and stroke survivors.

title: Healthy Eating & Nutrition Talk
description: Informative session on healthy eating habits, personalised meal planning and maintaining a well-balanced diet for seniors. Learn practical tips for nutrition and wellness.

title: Advance Care Planning Workshop
description: Informational workshop on planning for future healthcare decisions. Learn about advance care planning, lasting power of attorney and how to communicate your wishes to loved ones.

description: Complimentary health screening for seniors including blood pressure monitoring, BMI checks and basic health assessments. Walk-in basis, no appointment needed.

description: Blends traditional ink-and-paper Chinese calligraphy practice with a modern digital app. Learn the art of beautiful writing while embracing technology.
